## Summary

What changed, why, and how? Link related issues if any.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test coverage

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Tests pass (`go test ./...`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`golangci-lint run ./...`)
- [ ] New code has tests
- [ ] Documentation updated if public API changed

## Breaking Changes

Does this break existing users? If yes, describe what changes they need to make.
